title: CreateThingModelVersionAttributes
description: Request payload for creating a Thing Model Version.

description.description: A human-readable summary of the purpose of the entity.

documentation.description: A URL to additional information about this entity.

labels.description: Queryable Key Value pairs to be added to the Version. Labels can be used to store additional metadata about the Version.

ancestor.description: The versionId of this Version's ancestor if it has an ancestor.

contentType.description: Content type of the thing model Version.

thingModelLabels.description: Queryable Key Value pairs to be added to the parent Thing Model. Labels can be used to store additional metadata about the Thing Model.
